data.name: Monstrous Dungeon
data.detailed_description:
Travel to the frontier city of Belkend, founded around the last known lair of the long dead Demon Lord! After taking out a massive loan you are now the proud owner defunct brothel... All you need now are staff to run it. Thankfully the dungeon is teeming with all manner of Monster Girls. Delve the dungeon, capture workers, and build the greatest establishment the city has ever seen! Just make sure to pay your debts...

Explore the ever changing Lord's Dungeon. Hire a mercenaries or train a team of your own to explore, fight, and loot everything they come across. Manage your party's Health, Energy, Lust, and Fear as you disarm traps, battle monster girls, and uncover the mysteries of the Lord's Dungeon.

Manage and run your own establishment. Put your Monster Girls to work: serving drinks to your patrons, dancing on stage, or seeing to their needs behind closed doors. Upgrade and Decorate your rooms to attract a wide variety of patrons. Manage your girls Moods, deal with rowdy customers, and clean up afterwards to keep them coming back. 

Capture Monster Girls, build their loyalty, then have them work and fight for you! Train a variety of skills to make them better workers. Craft and enchant powerful equipment for your girls. Learn and upgrade a wide variety of combat abilities and build a party that can reach the depths of the dungeon. Grow your relationship to uncover their story and see dozens of H-scenes.

Features

- Dozens of Monster Girls - Over 15 species to find, each with strange and alluring variants. Find them all!

- Explore a Procedural Dungeon - Delve through 5 different biomes in an ever changing dungeon. No two dungeons are the same!

- Fight Powerful Bosses - Each dungeon ends with a boss with their own mechanics.

- Manage your own Establishment - Use your Monster Girls to clean, wait tables, dance, and tend to your patrons behind closed doors.

- Tame Monster Girls - Spend time with your girls, bonding with them and unlocking a wide variety of erotic scenes.

- Overarching story - befriend various NPCs and uncover the mysteries surrounding Belkend and the Lord's Dungeon.

- Craft and Upgrade - Craft powerful gear, unlock outfits, and upgrade your establishment.

data.short_description: Travel to the Frontiers to open your very own Monster Girl Tavern! Hire mercenaries to delve the dungeon for gold and equipment. Capture Monster Girls to put them to work. Upgrade your tavern, train your girls, and uncover the mysteries of the dungeon... Just make sure to pay off your loans!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
